body, rear three-quarter angle, tires gripping hard, sparks under rear side from aggressive cornering","license_plate":"77-10","door_marking":"安全第一― 納期厳守です"},"background":{"city":"Tokyo at signage"},"text_language":"Japanese","quality":"ultra-detailed, crisp print-ready composition, believable magazine scan, high contrast, layered editorial graphics","parameters":["{argument name=\"game title\" default=\"出世最速伝説 プロボックス・ランナー\"}","{argument name=\"vehicle color\" default=\"white\"}","{argument name=\"city\" default=\"Tokyo\"}","{argument name=\"review score\" default=\"8.7\"}","{argument name=\"deadline timer\" default=\"03:42\"}"],"prompt":"Create a single dense Japanese video game magazine feature page for a fictional driving simulator. The centerpiece is a photorealistic {argument name=\"vehicle color\" default=\"white\"} compact commercial van drifting fast on a wet nighttime expressway in {argument name=\"city\" default=\"Tokyo\"}, rear three-quarter view, sparks scraping from underneath, blue route arrows painted as glowing game guidance on the road, and bright green overhead road signs. Use a bold oversized Japanese title {argument name=\"game title\" default=\"出世最速伝説 プロボックス・ランナー\"} across the top, with explosive yellow and red magazine typography. Surround the hero image with exactly 12 editorial panels and callouts: 1 top-left header strip, 3 burst badges, 1 main promo burst, 2 right-side widgets, 4 left-side player stat boxes, 1 center description, 1 feature checklist with 4 bullets, 1 speed cluster, 3 strategy panels, 4 management/review panels, and 5 footer promo slogans. Include a countdown timer set to {argument name=\"deadline timer\" default=\"03:42\"}, a complaint meter with 4 face icons, a speedometer reading 128 km/h in 5th gear, a route minimap, a status screen with rank B+, and a large review badge showing {argument name=\"review score\" default=\"8.7\"}. Add a small portrait of a tired salaryman player avatar and a mysterious silhouette teaser in the bottom right. Make it look like a glossy chaotic game magazine review page from Japan, humorous but intense, with high readability, thick outlines, neon accents, and print-authentic texture."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"虚构驾驶模拟游戏的日本游戏杂志封面风格专题文章","genre":"高能周刊游戏杂志排版、密集编辑布局、华丽的街机评测美学、戏剧性的日本小报设计","subject":{"main":"一辆白色的紧凑型日本商用货车在东京高速公路上进行夜间漂移","game_title":"{argument name=\"game title\" 600m、湾岸线 Bayshore-route 羽田 Haneda 以及银座 Ginza / 新宿 Shinjuku"},"style":{"rendering":"写实车辆合成与游戏 UI 良好","路线地图（首都高）"]},{"title":"中心描述","position":"主车下方中部","count":1,"labels":["白色商务货车在首都高速上飞驰，保护截止日期，避免投诉，赢得上司信任，并在这一款奇特的职场晋升驾驶模拟器中安全交付货物"]},{"title":"功能清单","position":"中右侧黄色方框","count":4,"labels":["截止日期压力系统","投诉连锁事件","来自上司的下压力演出","意外的『休息槽』"]},{"title":"速度集群","position":"右中部","count":2,"labels":["128 -450pt"]},{"count":1,"labels":["游戏数据"]},{"count":1,"labels":["本周话题"]}],"ui_details":{"left_stats":{"rank":"B+","next_points":"还差 的数字读数","route_map":"带有彩色道路和路线标记的小型迷你地图","status_screen":{"rank":"B+","score":"7,850 pt","deadline_progress":"92%","claims":"2 件","accidents":"0 件","days_off":"1 天","money":"1,286,000 default=\"8.7\"}"},"characters":[{"role":"状态肖像中的驾驶员头像","appearance":"面部模糊的日本上班族，穿着西装打领带，中等长度深色头发，疲惫的办公室职员形象"},{"role":"剪影预告","appearance":"右下角问号旁的一个神秘人类黑色剪影"}],"vehicle":{"type":"类似 Toyota Probox 的白色配送/公司货车","condition":"略显脏污的写实车身，后侧 45 度角，轮胎紧抓地面，激进过弯时后侧下方溅出火花","license_plate":"77-10","door_marking":"安全第一― 严守截止日期"},"background":{"city":"东京夜景","road":"多车道高架高速公路弯道","effects":"动态模糊、光轨、湿地反射、戏剧性透视、发光的导航箭头、密集的标志"},"text_language":"日语","quality":"超精细、清晰的印刷级构图、逼真的杂志扫描感、高对比度、分层编辑图形","parameters":["{argument name=\"game title\" default=\"出世最速传说 Probox Runner\"}","{argument name=\"vehicle color\" default=\"白色\"}","{argument name=\"city\" default=\"东京\"}","{argument name=\"review score\" default=\"8.7\"}","{argument name=\"deadline timer\" default=\"03:42\"}"],"prompt":"创建一个密集的日本电子游戏杂志专题页面，用于展示一款虚构的驾驶模拟游戏。中心是一辆写实的 {argument name=\"vehicle color\" default=\"白色\"} 紧凑型商用货车，在 {argument name=\"city\" default=\"东京\"} 的湿滑夜间高速公路上高速漂移，后侧 45 度视角，车底溅出火花，路面上绘有作为发光游戏引导的蓝色路线箭头，以及明亮的绿色高架路标。在顶部使用醒目的超大日本标题 {argument name=\"game title\" default=\"出世最速传说 Probox Runner\"}，并配以爆炸性的黄色和红色杂志排版。在主图周围布置 12 个编辑面板和标注：1 个左上角标题栏、3 个爆炸贴纸、1 个主宣传贴、2 个右侧小部件、4 个左侧玩家统计框、1 个中心描述、1 个包含 4 个要点的功能清单、1 个速度集群、3 个策略面板、4 个管理/评测面板以及 5 个底部宣传口号。包含一个设置为 {argument name=\"deadline timer\" default=\"03:42\"} 的倒计时器、一个带有 4 个面部图标的投诉仪表、一个显示 5 档 128 km/h 的速度表、一个路线迷你地图、一个显示 B+ 等级的状态屏幕，以及一个显示 {argument name=\"review score\" default=\"8.7\"} 的大型评测徽章。在右下角添加一个疲惫的上班族玩家头像和一个神秘的剪影预告。使其看起来像是一页来自日本的华丽、混乱的游戏杂志评测页面，幽默而激烈，具有高可读性、粗轮廓、霓虹点缀和印刷真实的质感。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 虚构日本驾驶游戏杂志页面：此内容用于生成一个密集的日本杂志风格专题页面，展示一款虚构的街机驾驶模拟游戏，非常适合用于模拟游戏新闻、恶搞编辑艺术或复古游戏宣传设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: callout, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
